content: I used to get free magic packs at school when it first came out
Commander game nights with our friend group each month
Metas are a thing in every tcg lol
Yeah...usually one card getting buff which makes a deck playable
Its just that some TCG are more balanced meta
~~The only thing making DM playable rn is Dragoon~~
I remember they unbanned block dragon and everyone went straight up to adamancipator LMAO
Cuz master duel is unbalanced as hell
having rotating tier 0 deck for month because they want sell new cards is bad
DL on his 3-4th T0 format this year already
chat what do i call characters with high stats but zero mechanics behind
That's how banlists usually work in a decent bunch of card games
"we banned this but then we give even stronger new card to that other deck"
YGO as game is fundamentally broken when you don't have any resource system
yea i saw a meme the other day about how people who play card games don’t fear stat sticks but a weak ass card that makes the entire deck usable in its own archetype
They ban something and introduce something with omni-negate
i remember playing that one card game on roblox half a year ago
Yep, there is a boss monster that is both stat stick and boardwipe shit is broken
Game is all about building board when goign first if not interrupted, to have least 3-4 negates
I'm not even surprised that Roblox has card games
then you stop everything opponent does and win cuz you can make that board full of 3k+ beaters
that shit is TEN years old

Anyways, the core issue with modern YGO is
The lack of significant restrictions/locks for new archetypes
by card game i meant a tcg
You forget to put a significant restriction, and now you can slap 1040184 engines to that deck
Remember when we had turns in yu gi oh? Yeah now its just otk <:ganyuKMS:1146275949323747469>
I have Bad news for you
shit gets horrible when you actually know how the play the deck
I mean sure but like u gotta draw it...
there’s one archetype in the game where if you kill 4 units in 1 turn you get a permanent buff for the rest of the round 😭
true... and drawing on opponent turn is almost impossible if they take out your maxx c
Okay i can take the blame on that for my shuraig set up with simorgh and apex avian
and somehow the cards also do summon 100/100s just for them to die
what the fuck even is this
I remember that one...white forest combo
Well heroes is atleast the balanced deck
YGO had good modern formats.. but Konami releases usually fucked up and well
THERES EVEN LIKE 6 DECKS CIRCLES AROUND THE GRAVEYARD
We had things like Malice and Snake eyes formats
I miss good old stardust dragon days
I pretty much stopped YGO moment it turned into negate spam
thank god there’s no PoGs in that game it’d be so scary
Malice with a half decent hand was not beatable
You can literally show your hand to opponent, and give them win
But once u do get that naberu...nightmare unicorn boooom
Honestly i was having fun magic mallet and library for exodia summon <:KEKW:899694203163004998>
who put rice on my kettle
there’s just a clump of cooked rice on top of my kettle

But yeah, we have horrible formats because 
A) Konami just releases a strong deck that curvestomp everything else in the format 
B) Konami releases a fine deck... But a oversight just make the deck splashable/being able to splah multiple engines, and things just spiral from there
I need to check if i still have my old cards back in italy
Tbf it does NOT help that we still have generic extra deck bridges
1-card engines are bad for all games.
you shouldn't be allowed to get +5 from single card when game has no resource system
1 card combos are not that bad for the game... If the end result is not a unbreakable board
A single Snake eyes Ash was like
But like..the bloody blue eyes got a omni-negate
Partially why I like system where game have resource system
you can't just go from 0 to 100 in in turn
Vanguard has no resource system itself, but games are made that they'll last least 5-6 turns
because damage taken is used as resource to costs
and cards don't have their full power without that resource most of time

Again, the problem with YGO is not the lack of mana or equivalents
The problem is 30 years of card design randomly making a deck broken
And the ammount of random bridges between archetypes making a deck strong
If they used more restricted archetypes to begin with, there wouldn't be issue
vanguard is peak i wish i wasn't so bad at it
But if you can play 1-2 cards of some archetype cuz you can search that othjer piece and start combo with it
withotu being that archetype, its just bad design
Some decks are designed to being played with other archetypes
The problem comes when you forgot what those 2 can do
Is not the same, for example
Negates are what are breaking enjoyment of YGO mostly, imho
If you odn't have negates, you lose. If you have fewer negates, than opponent, you lose
A on field, main phase monster negate, a synchro 10, and a pop 2
How the fuck was this shit called
I wish they kept traps more relevant
I wish they didn't drop the most broken archetypes and then nerf them once everyone stops playing or develops decks specifically to counter them
Vanquish soul K9 ending on monster negate, a bounce, 2 non targeted pops, a hand negate, a hand rip, free draw, and a board wipe
I forgot the potential monster steal
oh, you breathed? well, my deck explodes like a fucking nuke on YOUR turn and hard counters your entire hand
that's how it felt dueling against Vanquished K9

embeds.title: Yugioh Master Duel Intense Altergiest Duel

content: or for the LOVE OF CHRIST pray you have a ash blossom
no current modern deck can brick itself
littearly the meta now is can your deck survive 2 negates its a good deck now
i love my funny altergiest loop
Just stack up ash blossom, effect veiler, called by the grave, infinite imperm, forbidden droplet
as im not even useing altergiests correctly just being fucking annoying
kashtira banishes so its immune to called by the grave
the zone denial is a floating effect
so it doesnt go away till your next turn
The real way to win is to make your wincon some card with text too long, because the other player won't read it
This is literally the experience of master duel, your opponent just never reads your cards
If its in person you can just slide a 9mm on the table and opponent will give up
my fav deck that can easily brick itself is flower cardians
i love playing hanafuda while playing yugioh
oh yeah i also ran invoked element saber deck too
i just accidently just made the most cancerous decks
my other fav rouge deck is DD dynamite infernal tempest
Unfortunately some of the most fun decks fall under this archetype lol
My exodia deck was almost perfect, only bricked like once every 5 matches <:Aurita_please:1356053110375714817>
infernal tempest  delete ALL monster cards in both decks throw 2 necro faces in there for funny shinanagins
then DD dynamite and watch them explode for 16k lp
infact i had a funny moment
were some one was setting up for a otk deck of green maju da eiza
but i had DD dynamite on the back row
waited for him to set up
go into battle phase were he had 10k atk/def
watch him fucking explode and not get the satisfaction
my friends made me ban so many decks of mine cuz i just had funny gimicks
then theres the glory of trickstars
were i've glitched master duel to over kill opponents even after the win screen goes off its still harming them
its really fun to watch thoes decks that can combo inf wise
and see them take 1.2k lp damage per drawn card
im a asshole in yugioh lmao
it was fun busting out Crimson Dragon on my opponent's turn, and then going into whatever lvl 12 synchro I wanted
